name: Mexican Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cilantro-lime vinaigrette and set aside.
2. Bring several inches of water to a boil in a large, shallow pan.
3. Add the onion, carrot, bay leaf, hot pepper, coriander sprigs, and peppercorns to the boiling water.
4. Simmer for about 15 minutes.
5. Add the chicken breasts to the pan, cover and simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the meat is tender and juices run clear.
6. Keep the chicken in the pan and set aside to cool in the liquid.
7. Remove the skin and bones from the chicken, then cut or shred the meat into bite-sized pieces.
8. Toss the shredded chicken with about 1/4 cup of the cilantro-lime vinaigrette and refrigerate until ready to serve.
At serving time:
1. Line a platter with watercress or other crisp greens.
2. Arrange avocado slices on top of the greens.
3. Drizzle with a few tablespoons of the cilantro-lime vinaigrette.
4. Pile the chicken in the center and arrange halved cherry tomatoes around it.
5. Scatter chopped green onions and chopped cilantro over the salad.
Makes 4 servings.
